entries.text:
Verse 8

Now ye are full

Already are ye filled; already are ye become rich. Contra. 1 Corinthians 4:9-12; 1 Peter 1:4.

Verse 9

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 13

world

kosmos = mankind. (See Scofield "Matthew 4:8").

Verse 14

sons

(Greek - τέκνον, child, "born one)."

Verse 17

son Gr.

teknon, child, "born one."
